TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Mike_Barr, title = Mike_Barr, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mike_Barr} }

S.FORM: Mike Barr tatama, nalecuhan ciniza i 10 a bulad 19 a demiad, 1950 a mihcan, Mike Barr, u miunduay ciniza.
S.PHON: mikə barr tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan, mikə barr, u miunduaj ʦiniza.
S.FORM: Mike Barr tatama, nalecuhan ciniza i 10 a bulad 19 a demiad, 1950 a mihcan, Mike Barr, u miunduay ciniza.
S.PHON: mikə barr tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan, mikə barr, u miunduaj ʦiniza.
